data.title: Ballard welcomes Ralph Robinett as Chief Operating Officer
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 13, 2026, Ballard Power Systems announced the appointment of Ralph Robinett as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Robinett will be taking over from Lee Sweetland, starting on the same date. With over 25 years of experience in global operations, Robinett is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company. Ballard Power Systems is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BLDP and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the same symbol.

data.title: Eagle Real Estate Partners and TriPost Capital Partners Announce Strategic GP Co-Investment Partnership
data.description: EREP, a multifamily investment company, has announced a programmatic commitment of over $50 million. This investment is set to facilitate acquisitions in affordable and workforce housing, with a projected total sum of over $1.5 billion. This initiative aims to address housing needs in various communities.

data.title: Bracco Affirms ASNC Position Statement Elevating Cardiac PET with Myocardial Blood Flow as Preferred Standard for Coronary Artery Disease
data.description: Bracco's strategic approach has been affirmed by recent guidance, demonstrating their expertise in diagnostic imaging and pioneering work in cardiac positron emission tomography (PET) over the past 30 years. The validation comes on April 13, 2026, and highlights Bracco's position as a market leader in this field.

data.title: XCharge North America Celebrates Strategic European Expansion with New Assembly Facility in Spain
data.description: In Kyle, Texas, XCharge North America, a top provider of high-power EV charging and battery-integrated solutions aimed at enhancing the North American electrical grid, marked a significant achievement of its parent company, XCHG Limited (NASDAQ: XCH), by revealing plans for its inaugural European assembly plant based in Valencia, Spain. The establishment, spanning close to 3,000 square meters, signifies a move by XCharge to bolster its North American endeavors through a more varied global supply chain and an expedited pace of operations.

data.title: Media Consulting Group Joins Index Marketplaces to Enable Structured Supply Activation and Upstream Performance Decisioning
data.description: A recent development in the media industry revealed that Media Consulting Group (MCG) has entered into a partnership on April 13, 2026, with Index Exchange. Index Exchange is recognized as a reputable independent supply-side platform known for its intelligent decision-making capabilities on a global scale. The partnership aims to facilitate structured and performance-driven supply activation.

data.title: Gulf Brokers: How to invest in oil without owning a single barrel
data.description: Retail investors now have the opportunity to engage in commodity investments in MAHÉ, Seychelles, as of April 13, 2026. Utilizing methods that do not require physical ownership, this approach has proven to be a reliable means of generating profits, particularly in a bear commodity market. A variety of investment instruments are accessible to individuals seeking to participate in this sector.

data.title: New Memoir Explores Healing, Resilience and Life Beyond Chronic Illness
data.description: "Crohnie kNOw More" is a story detailing the experiences of a woman battling Crohn's disease, shedding light on unconventional healing methods and the significance of self-confidence in overall wellness. This account follows Molly Heskett's struggles and triumphs in coping with a chronic illness. The narrative is set in Scottsdale, Arizona, with the information being released on April 13, 2026, via PRNewswire. This personal journey explores life with the disease, showcasing the impact of self-reliance and non-traditional treatments on health and well-being.

data.title: Mobileye Announces Timing of its First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Tech company Mobileye Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MBLY) revealed that it will announce its financial results for Q1 2026 on April 23, 2026, before the market opens. There will be a conference call at 8:00am ET (3:00pm IT) on the same day to discuss the results and give a business update. The call will be led by Professor Amnon Shashua, CEO, Moran Shemesh Rojansky, CFO, Nimrod Nehushtan, EVP – Business Development and Strategy, and Dan Galves.

data.title: Frontier Medicines Appoints Veteran Drug Development Leader David R. Epstein to Board of Directors
data.description: In a recent announcement, Frontier Medicines Corporation, a company specializing in precision medicines in Boston and South San Francisco, revealed the addition of David R. Epstein to its board of directors. Epstein, who currently holds the positions of chairman and CEO at Ottimo Pharma, previously served as the CEO of Seagen. This move comes as Frontier Medicines continues its focus on developing small molecule oncology and immunology drugs targeting previously untreatable disease-causing proteins.

data.title: Calavo Growers Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Santa Paula, California on April 13, 2026, Calavo Growers, Inc. (Nasdaq-GS: CVGW) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share on its common stock. Calavo is renowned for its global presence in sourcing, packing, and distributing fresh avocados, tomatoes, papayas, and manufacturing guacamole along with other avocado products. The Board of Directors' decision highlights the company's commitment to rewarding shareholders.
CONAGRA NAMES J.M. SMUCKER'S JOHN BRASE AS CEO

data.title: Vireo Growth Announces California Retail Joint Venture with Glass House Brands
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Vireo Growth Inc. (“Vireo”) (CSE: VREO; OTCQX: VREOF) and Glass House Brands Inc. (“Glass House”) (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) (CBOE CA: GLAS.WT.U) (OTCQX: GLASF) (OTCQX: GHBWF) shared plans for a partnership to establish a prominent cannabis retail platform in California. This venture aims to create one of the state's largest cannabis retail networks. Upon meeting regulatory requirements and finalizing certain conditions, both companies will merge their California dispensary operations into the new enterprise, with each party holding a 50% stake in the joint entity.

data.title: Fredonia Mining Inc. Grants Stock Options and Formalizes Management Agreements
data.description: In Toronto on April 13, 2026, Fredonia Mining Inc. (TSXV: FRED) announced the granting of 1,330,000 stock options at $0.68 per common share. Out of these, 935,000 options were allocated to directors and officers listed below, while the rest were given to eligible employees and consultants of the Company and its subsidiaries.

data.title: Orca Energy Group Announces Definitive Agreement to Divest Tanzanian Business
data.description: Orca Energy Group Inc. disclosed on April 13, 2026, in Tortola, British Virgin Islands, that it has finalized a Share Purchase Agreement with Taifa Gas Tanzania Limited and Amber Energy Investment L.L.C-FZ. The agreement entails the sale of all shares of Orca's wholly-owned Mauritian subsidiary, PAE PanAfrican Energy Corporation. Following the completion of the agreement, Taifa will possess 49% of PAEM, while Amber will hold 51%.

data.title: Palvella Therapeutics Appoints John D. Doux, M.D., M.B.A., Dermatologist and Recognized Leader in Rare Skin Diseases, to Board of Directors
data.description: Experienced physician and investor in life sciences with over 20 years of expertise in clinical practice, biotechnology investment, and board management.

data.title: U.S. experts' new consensus supports MediWound’s strategy for chronic wound debridement, per recent report.
data.description: A new report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking the fastest rate of expansion in almost half a century. This growth is largely due to the rapid recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic, which resulted in a contraction of 3.5% in 2020. The report also highlights that emerging and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.3% in 2021, while advanced economies are forecasted to see a growth rate of 5.4%. However, the report warns that the recovery is not yet secure, as the pandemic continues to pose risks to economic stability. It stresses the importance of equitable vaccine distribution and continued policy support to ensure a sustained recovery.
ASP Isotopes Inc. announces business update, details on its financial performance and future plans.

data.title: Bombardier Announces April 15, 2026 as the Start of its New Normal Course Issuer Bid
data.description: Montreal, April 13, 2026 - Bombardier Inc. announced its new normal course issuer bid (NCIB) will begin on April 15, 2026. The Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has approved the purchase of up to 605,435 Class A shares and up to 4,327,859 Class B subordinate voting shares from April 15, 2026, to April 14, 2027. This represents 5.0% of the 12,108,700 Class A shares and 5.0% of the 86,557,188 Class B subordinate voting shares issued and outstanding as of April 2, 2026. It is important to note that this number excludes 1,521,895 Class B subordinate voting shares held in the Trust Account as of the same date.

data.title: BullFrog AI Provides Business Update: Strengthened Balance Sheet Supports Continued Execution as Company Aims to Ramp Commercial Activity with Global Pharmaceutical and Biotechnology Partners
data.description: A recent commercial deal with a leading global pharmaceutical company ranked in the top 5 has set the foundation for further enterprise negotiations. This agreement marks the beginning of a burgeoning pipeline of discussions with other potential partners. The company has secured a runway extending into late 2027, indicating a stable and promising outlook for future collaborations.

data.title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports Interim Futility Analysis from Pivotal ALPHA3 Trial Showing 58.3% MRD Clearance with Cemacabtagene Ansegedleucel (Cema-Cel) vs. 16.7% in Observation Arm in First-Line Consolidation LBCL
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. revealed findings from the scheduled interim futility analysis of its pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial in first-line consolidation large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL). The company, listed on Nasdaq as ALLO, is at the forefront of developing allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T) products for cancer and autoimmune disease. The trial holds significant importance as it aims to address critical medical needs. The data shared is pivotal for the progression of this clinical-stage biotechnology firm, with the findings providing crucial insights for the future direction of their research and development efforts.
